finding.summary: The track has extremely wide stereo with negative phase correlation (-0.25), causing potential mono compatibility issues. Mid channel is 14 dB below side channel, indicating dominance of out-of-phase content.
finding.probable_cause: The enabled 'VST3: Generic Chorus' plugin is likely creating overly wide stereo spread, causing phase cancellation between channels.
finding.confidence_reason: Capture isolation verified, low silence fraction, and stereo correlation measurement is unambiguous.

evidence_refs.description: Stereo correlation is -0.25, indicating significant out-of-phase content.
Mid channel RMS is -28.0 dB, very low.
Side channel RMS is -14.0 dB, 14 dB higher than mid.
The chorus plugin is currently enabled.

proposal.reason: Preview bypassing VST3: Generic Chorus; this does not remove or delete the plugin; to test whether stereo_correlation increases.
